## Testing

## Security and privacy
- [ ] Tenant scope checked
- [ ] Server-side validation checked
- [ ] Sensitive data excluded from logs and client payloads
- [ ] CSV or output escaping checked where relevant

## Deployment

- [ ] Environment variables documented
- [ ] Rollback or forward-fix plan considered
